description_long: This machine gun features a robust, metallic construction with a cylindrical main body and a prominent, elongated barrel. The rear section includes a wide, flat stock with a slightly curved edge, likely designed for shoulder support, and a visible grip area. The central portion houses a large, circular mechanism, possibly a rotating or feed system, with several bolts and mechanical details. The barrel is relatively thick and appears reinforced, with a smooth, unfluted exterior and no visible cooling fins. There are no visible iron sights or optical attachments, and the magazine or ammunition feed system is not externally apparent. The overall finish is a dark, weathered metal with hints of copper and brown tones, suggesting heavy use or exposure.
description: A heavy, metallic machine gun with a cylindrical barrel, wide flat stock, and a large central feed mechanism, finished in dark, weathered metal.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the machine gun, including the flat stock, cylindrical barrel, and central circular mechanism.
description_view_1: Front-on view highlighting the barrel's end and the circular feed mechanism, with the stock and grip area less visible.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, showing the barrel, stock, and mechanical details from the other side.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the flat, wide stock and the back of the central mechanism, with the barrel receding into the distance.
attribute_stock_design: flat metal stock with a slightly curved edge
